Download Reference : The information presented in slide 1 of these carousels comes from this scientific publication: Respiratory Syncytial Virus Is the Leading Cause of United States Infant Hospitalizations, 2009–2019: A Study of the National (Nationwide) Inpatient Sample. 
Sample messages 
Message 1 (English) 
Did you know RSV is the leading cause of hospital stays for babies in their first year? The good news is you can help protect them from severe illness with an RSV immunization. Learn more about how to keep your little one safe from RSV. https://bit.ly/4fgwwcm 
Message 1 (Spanish) 
¿Sabías que el VRS es la causa principal de estadías hospitalarias para los bebés durante su primer añ
